caption: A group of performers dressed in traditional martial arts attire are engaged in a choreographed demonstration on a stage. The central figure, wearing a yellow outfit, stands with his back to the audience, while four other individuals, two on each side, are dressed in blue and appear to be holding long poles or staffs. They are positioned symmetrically, suggesting a coordinated routine. The background shows an audience seated at tables, attentively watching the performance. The setting is an indoor venue with elegant lighting, including chandeliers, which adds a formal atmosphere to the event. The performers seem to be preparing for or in the midst of executing a synchronized movement, possibly involving the use of the poles.
